---
name: Security Report
about: Report a vulnerability or security flaw (PLEASE DO NOT EXPOSE SENSITIVE DATA)
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: ['security', 'critical']
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the vulnerability**
A clear description of the security issue. If this is a highly critical exploit, please DO NOT post exact replication steps here in public. Instead, email the repository maintainer directly.

**Impact**
What can a malicious user achieve with this exploit? (e.g., Bypassing RBAC, cheating on exams, accessing other users' files).

**Proposed Fix (Optional)**
If you have an idea of how to patch it, describe it here.
